description: After correcting Rigby as owning agent for golf-booking workflow, assigned Chief as the owner. Chief's domain is daily ops and business logistics — not personal leisure. Golf is a social/lifestyle activity owned by Sterling.
correction: Sterling owns all social life, leisure, and lifestyle workflows including golf. Chief owns calendar and business ops. Sterling is the correct owning agent for golf-booking.
systemic_fix: When assigning workflow ownership, leisure and lifestyle activities (golf, dining, travel, social events) always route to Sterling. Chief owns professional daily ops only. Add this to agent routing heuristic.
